creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sat, Nov 25, 2006 at 09:41:54PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of comms/openobex,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/105854 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/105854

I do approve this patch. Many thanks to the submitter!

-- 
Guido Falsi <mad@madpilot.net>
